title: Enrich Singleton pattern — deep content, complexity, rationale, variations
description: Audit and enrich the Singleton pattern (id: singleton, category: creational). Verify UML diagram uses realistic names (DatabaseConnectionPool — already good). Verify all relationships complete. Add complexityAnalysis (O(1) getInstance, thread-safety variants), designRationale (why single instance, trade-offs with testability), commonVariations (Bill Pugh Holder, Enum, Double-checked locking, Eager init, ThreadLocal), antiPatterns (global state abuse, hidden dependencies, testing difficulties, lifecycle coupling). Add interviewDepth Q&A: 'How do you make Singleton thread-safe in Java?', 'Why is Singleton considered an anti-pattern by some?'. Verify TS/Python/Java code samples are realistic and complete. Compare with refactoring.guru/design-patterns/singleton for completeness.

antiPatterns has 3-4 common misuses (global state abuse, hidden deps, test coupling)
